server_down_description: Booster Break cannot reach the API on this network. Start the Docker backend, then run the check again.
setup_description: The recommended deployment serves the interface and API from the same Raspberry Pi domain. In development, Docker runs the API and Postgres, then Vite serves the interface.
setup_local_description: Prepare local variables, start the Docker services, then launch the frontend.
setup_credentials_env: Copy apps/api/.env.example to apps/api/.env.local and choose your own Postgres password.
setup_credentials_docker: In Docker Compose, DATABASE_URL uses the postgres host because it is the internal service name.
setup_credentials_production: In production, use the deploy bundle with Caddy. The web image contains a static Vite build served by nginx, with no Vite server running on the Raspberry Pi.
setup_production_github_pages: Avoid GitHub Pages when calling a private WiFi API: the browser can ask for permission to access local-network devices.
setup_production_server_env: Copy deploy/docker-compose.server.yml, deploy/Caddyfile, and deploy/booster-break.env.example to /opt/booster-break, then fill the private booster-break.env file. No secrets are included in the GitHub Container Registry images.
setup_production_slack: Slack OAuth must use the exact Caddy-proxied callback URL, for example https://booster.example.com/api/auth/slack/callback.
setup_production_domains: Caddy serves the interface on https://booster.example.com and proxies the API on /api, which avoids CORS and cross-site cookies.
api_unable_load_sets: Unable to load Pokemon booster sets
api_pack_cooldown: A booster was opened recently. Wait for the timer before opening another one.
api_sign_in_collection: Sign in to view your collection.
api_sign_in_open_pack: Sign in to open booster packs and save cards to your collection.
packs_description: Open booster packs and add every pull directly to your private collection.
packs_empty: Boosters load automatically. Try again in a moment.
packs_sign_in_timer: Sign in to open one booster at a time.
packs_selected_ready: {name} selected. One booster can be opened now.
collection_empty: Open a booster pack to start your collection.
